# Summary

Describe the change and how it improves the agent query -> gallery display -> human preference -> agent action loop.

## Checklist

- [ ] I ran `agentfiguregallery doctor`.
- [ ] I ran `python scripts/check_private_paths.py --root .`.
- [ ] New references have visible previews, not only scripts.
- [ ] Stable candidate IDs are preserved.
- [ ] Source attribution and license metadata are preserved where available.
- [ ] No tokens, private paths, raw upstream mirrors, or large generated outputs are committed.

## Validation

Paste the commands and key output used to validate this change.
